findings.title: Training use of customer data is too broad
findings.clause: use Customer Data, prompts, outputs, telemetry, and user feedback to train
findings.rationale: The training right should be opt-in and tightly scoped; customer data should not be used for model improvement by default.

findings.title: Customer data may be commingled
findings.clause: combined with data from other customers
findings.rationale: Commingling with other customers' data raises confidentiality, privacy, and segregation concerns.

findings.title: Deletion exceptions are too broad
findings.clause: except where retained in model weights, embeddings, logs, or backups
findings.rationale: The model weights, embeddings, logs, and backups exceptions undermine deletion and retention obligations.
